name: INTRACRANIAL HYPOTENSION
definition: rare cause of orthostatic headache worsening in upright position
discriminating_features: diffuse smooth linear pachymeningeal enhancement ← ↑ intracranial venous blood flow

general: diffuse smooth linear pachymeningeal enhancement ← ↑ intracranial venous blood flow

clinical.Rx: conservative therapy with bed rest; autologous epidural blood patch
